rationale: W8 micro gearbox series is explicitly designed for drones and humanoid robot joints, with frame sizes as small as 08 mm, high torque-to-weight, and low noise.
KGR series with ≤4 arcmin backlash, IP65, and corrosion-resistant aluminum housing suits outdoor antenna positioning requiring smooth low-speed control.
K-R series hypoid gearbox with ≤5 arcmin backlash and compact right-angle design fits antenna positioner envelope constraints.
Harmonic drive's near-zero backlash and smooth velocity output at low speeds are ideal for precision antenna pointing.
PL series tightening machine is purpose-built for bolting with wear-resistant planetary trains, multi-directional load bearings, and optional built-in torque/displacement sensors.
TKZ series tightening gearbox is explicitly designed for precision fastening with customized gear profiles, impact-resistant bearings, and optional torque sensors.
TL offset-type tightening machine gearbox with profile-modified gears, multi-directional load bearings, and optional torque/displacement sensors is purpose-built for assembly bolting.

application: Manual backup drive for remote equipment
rationale: KPX-S series hand-input planetary reducer is explicitly designed for manual backup operation when electric power is unavailable, with up to 97% efficiency and low backlash.

application: Manual backup drive for remote equipment
rationale: KPX-SY series hand-input gearbox is explicitly designed for applications where electric power is unavailable, offering a reliable mechanical backup in remote areas.
RD series multi-axis integrated servo drive supports 2–6 axes in one housing with 30% space reduction, vibration suppression, and auto-tuning — purpose-built for coordinated multi-axis systems.
XAM series servo motors with 5-pole-pair low-cogging design and 23-bit absolute encoder pair perfectly with RD series drives for high-performance multi-axis servo systems.
AGV steering & differential wheel with planetary gear inside the hub, 48V DC servo, encoders, and electronic/mechanical limit switches is purpose-built for AGV steering drive.
KFQ150 integrated drive wheel can serve as a drive component in a differential steering AGV, though it lacks the dedicated steering unit of the steering wheel.
CaesarPlanetary HP variant with low backlash and HT variant with high torque, sharing common mounting, directly addresses precision rotary axis needs with upgrade path.
Harmonic drives offer near-zero backlash (<1 arcmin) and high torsional stiffness suitable for CNC rotary axes, though limited torque capacity vs. large-frame planetaries.
5KH series high-precision planetary with low backlash and high stiffness meets the reversing-load and lost-motion requirements of a B/C axis.
ZF-S series is explicitly designed for machine tool spindle drives in lathes and VMCs, with helical gearing, low backlash, high radial load, and 24V shift-by-wire actuation.

PWZD series is explicitly designed for tunnel boring and pipe jacking, with carburized/ground gears, motor-direct input, ultra-compact housing, and >20% higher load capacity than standard planetaries.
PWHZ rotary planetary gearbox is explicitly designed for slewing in truck cranes, crawler cranes, and ship decks, with integrated wet multi-disc brake and modular planetary stages.
CaesarPlanetary's low-backlash HP variant and high-torque HT variant with common mounting interface allow easy torque scaling for indexing dials without bracket redesign.
5KH series high-precision planetary gearbox with low backlash and high torque density suits the intermittent high-peak-torque demands of a packaging indexer.
R series general-purpose planetary gearbox with IP65 and 20,000 h life can handle indexing duty, though its backlash (8 arcmin) is higher than ideal for precise station alignment.
KFQ150 is an integrated AGV drive wheel combining servo motor and high-precision gearmotor in a compact hub design with resin-rubber tire, exactly matching AGV drivetrain requirements.
XGV series servo integrated drive wheel with coaxial motor+reducer, available in 500W–1500W with 150/180mm wheels, is explicitly designed for AGV/AMR drive applications.
PWZQ hub-mounted planetary gearbox is designed for direct wheel/drive integration in mobile machinery and AGVs, though it lacks the integrated motor of the KFQ150.
PWJY series with integrated planetary gear and rubber-coated roller could serve as a drive roller for AGV applications, but it is designed for horizontal installation rather than direct wheel drive.

Harmonic drives are the standard for cobot joints; the 8/11 series offers high transmission accuracy, high torsional stiffness, and multiple structural forms (HF, HS, SF, SS) ideal for compact arm integration.
KBD-MC series ultra-short harmonic drive reducers in frame sizes 14–32 are purpose-built for compact cobot joints where axial length is critical.
KCD-MC series ultra-short component-design harmonic drives with high repeatability and torsional stiffness directly address cobot joint backlash and envelope constraints.
5KH series planetary gearbox offers low backlash and high torque density, but planetary designs are bulkier than harmonic drives for the same reduction in a cobot arm.
W8 micro gearbox series is explicitly designed for humanoid robot joints and drones, with frame sizes 08–32, high torque density, impact resistance, and low noise.
KBD-MC ultra-short harmonic drive in small frame sizes (14–32) offers the compactness and low backlash needed for humanoid joints, though slightly larger than micro-gearbox options.
KCD-MC ultra-short component harmonic drive in frame sizes 14–32 provides high accuracy in a compact package suitable for humanoid joints.
KFDG series direct-coupled electric cylinder integrates servo motor, drive, and ball screw for thrust up to 30 kN and speeds up to 500 mm/s, ideal for robot lifting axes.
Servo linear joint module with planetary roller screw, real-time sensor feedback, and DC48V power is purpose-built for precise linear motion in robotic joints.
Kofon precision ball screw with ≥90% efficiency, diameters 16–63 mm, and high positioning accuracy can serve as the linear conversion element in a custom linear joint.
KGR series hypoid right-angle gearbox with IP65, ≤4 arcmin backlash, and tapered roller bearings for high overturning moment is well-suited for outdoor tracker azimuth/elevation drives.
K-R series hypoid right-angle gearbox with ≤5 arcmin backlash, IP65, and 96% efficiency provides a compact right-angle solution for solar tracker drives.
KPX-S series hand-input reducer could serve as a manual backup for tracker drives, but is not the primary drive for motorized tracking.
